query:
SELECT p.id, p.supplier, p.receiptNumber, p.status, p.syncError, p.totalAmount,
       GROUP_CONCAT(pi.productName, '|', pi.quantity, '|', pi.unitCost SEPARATOR ';;') as items
FROM purchases p
LEFT JOIN purchase_items pi ON pi.purchaseId = p.id
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.id DESC
LIMIT 5;

FROM purchases p
LEFT JOIN purchase_items pi ON pi.purchaseId = p.id
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.id DESC
LIMIT 5;
